{{#extend "layout"}} {{#replace "title"}} {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-access_code.title" study_name=study_name}} {{/replace}} {{#replace "body"}} {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-access_code.instructions"}}
    {{#if email}}
  • {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-access_code.email"}} {{email}}
    • {{/if}} {{#if username}}
  • {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-access_code.username"}} {{username}}
    • {{/if}} {{#if mobile}}
  • {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-access_code.mobile"}} {{mobile}}
    • {{/if}}
  • {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-access_code.accessCode"}} {{access_code}}
{{#if downloadText}}
{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-access_code.downloadText"}}
    {{#if appleStore}}
  • {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-access_code.appleStore"}} {{appleStore_url}}
    • {{/if}} {{#if googleStore}}
  • {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-access_code.googleStore"}} {{googleStore_url}}
    • {{/if}}
{{/if}}
